source_pr.title: ddl: speed up the execution time of `TestBackwardCompatibility`.
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: #24459


### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed:
When the test here wants to execute "add index", the number of ranges in the table is greater than the number of index workers. Here the index worker is 4, so the number of ranges is set to 10.

### Related changes

- PR to update `pingcap/docs`/`pingcap/docs-cn`:
- Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->


| branch | `go test -check.f TestBackwardCompatibility`  |  go test ddl package with race(`go test -v -vet=off -p 5 -timeout 20m -race`)   |     `TestBackwardCompatibility` execution time in running ddl package test with race |
----------------------------------------------------------- |----------- |----------- |----------- |
 |   before this PR(2ca98e393cb6873727a177cb5c974fa8d3ca61c5)  |      56s      |       566s |  79s  | 
 |   after this PR |      7s      |       505s | 14s  | 

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- `No release note`.

symptoms: | branch | `go test -check.f TestBackwardCompatibility` | go test ddl package with race(`go test -v -vet=off -p 5 -timeout 20m -race`) | `TestBackwardCompatibility` execution time in running ddl package test with race |
failure_signature: | branch | `go test -check.f TestBackwardCompatibility` | go test ddl package with race(`go test -v -vet=off -p 5 -timeout 20m -race`) | `TestBackwardCompatibility` execution time in running ddl package test with race |
root_cause_explanation: `TestBackwardCompatibility` was slow/flaky under race/CI time budgets because it split the test table into too many regions (100), making subsequent DDL (add index) work heavier than needed. Under slower CI or race builds, that extra work could cause intermittent timeouts or excessive runtime. The PR stabilizes the test by reducing the split key count from 100 to 10, significantly speeding up execution.
fix_pattern: Reduce workload in long-running tests to fit CI/race time budgets (e.g., split fewer regions/keys) to avoid intermittent timeouts and excessive runtime variance.

evidence: evidence: | branch | `go test -check.f TestBackwardCompatibility` | go test ddl package with race(`go test -v -vet=off -p 5 -timeout 20m -race`) | `TestBackwardCompatibility` execution time in running ddl package test with race |
